brands.title: Brands
brands.description: One or more brands to track. Each: {"name": "Asana", "aliases": [], "competitors": ["Trello", "Monday.com"]}. Batch as many brands as you like in one run.

queries.title: Buyer queries
queries.description: Questions your customers ask AI assistants (e.g. "best project management tool for small teams").
prefill: best project management tool for small teams
what project management software should a startup use

trackTrends.title: Track trends (week-over-week deltas)
trackTrends.description: Store this run's summary and report deltas vs your previous run — schedule weekly for automatic trend reports.

trendKey.title: Trend series key
trendKey.description: Optional label to keep separate trend series (e.g. per client).
